enumeration_literals.name: APNG_BLEND_OP_SOURCE
enumeration_literals.description: Overwrite the current contents of the frame's output buffer.

enumeration_literals.name: APNG_BLEND_OP_OVER
enumeration_literals.description: Composited onto the output buffer based on its alpha.

enumeration_literals.name: APNG_DISPOSE_OP_NONE
enumeration_literals.description: No disposal done on this frame before rendering the next.

enumeration_literals.name: APNG_DISPOSE_OP_BACKGROUND
enumeration_literals.description: To be cleared to fully transparent black.

enumeration_literals.name: APNG_DISPOSE_OP_PREVIOUS
enumeration_literals.description: To be reverted to the previous contents.
